device_name: RX-1 Rhythm Express Remote Cardiac Monitoring System
intended_use: The Rhythm Express remote cardiac monitoring system is intended for use by patients greater than 10 kg who either have or are at risk of having cardiac disease and those that demonstrate intermittent
intended_use_full: The Rhythm Express remote cardiac monitoring system is intended for use by patients greater than 10 kg who either have or are at risk of having cardiac disease and those that demonstrate intermittent symptoms indicative of cardiac disease and require cardiac monitoring on a continuing basis. The device continuously records ECG data and upon detection by an ECG analysis algorithm or manually initiated by the patient, automatically delivers the recorded cardiac activity to the server where it is presented for review by a medical professional.
target_condition: Cardiac arrhythmias (both symptomatic and asymptomatic); patients at risk of cardiac disease or with demonstrated cardiac disease requiring continuous monitoring
other_metrics: Bench test results verify that RX-1 Monitor system can continuously record ECG signal, store ECG data in device memory, and transmit manual or auto-activated event recordings to server via mobile network connection; all requirements met and device performs as designed
